current_plan.description: Build topical authority in AI x Finance Operations through twice-daily publishing targeting high-intent finance executives; baseline metrics pending GA4/GSC IAM credentials fix.
long_tail_keywords: how AI is changing investment banking 2026
current_plan.rationale: Strategy launched 2026-03-22 — only 1 day old, well within the 5-day minimum evaluation window. GA4 and GSC APIs remain blocked by the same IAM Service Account Credentials API 403/503 error (project 404709309506), so zero performance data is available to assess. Google Trends returned a 404 again. Tavily confirms robust competitor activity in AI-in-finance content (MX, InDataLabs, BizTech all publishing in the space), validating our pillar choice. Strategy must be held until instrumentation is restored.
